visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a modern, brightly lit kitchen. A woman with short, curly brown hair wearing a white cardigan and an apron decorated with cat patterns is washing yellow apples in a green strainer under a black faucet. She has an annoyed facial expression, looking off-camera. (2) The camera cuts to a dining area where a young girl with twin braids, wearing a school-style white shirt, sits at a marble table with bowls of food and rice. She looks bored and picks at her food with chopsticks while text overlays appear around her. (3) Returning to the kitchen, the woman continues washing apples, her mouth moving as if counting aggressively, holding an apple up with one hand. Then, a product shot shows a clear bottle of Goodies & Co. soap next to the sink as hands wash the apples. (4) In a new scene, the young girl sits on a sofa in a living room, looking at her phone. The woman enters through a dark door, carrying a silver metallic bag and wearing the same cat apron. She points at clothes scattered on the light-colored floor, her expression showing frustration. (5) A close-up shows the woman posing with a shiny silver Miyansol tote bag over her shoulder. Later, the girl is lying on a bed in a dimly lit room using her phone. She panics and turns off a bedside lamp as the woman enters with a phone flashlight, creating a high-contrast, dramatic shadow on the wall. (6) The woman uses a black ODOYO massage gun on her neck, looking relieved with her eyes closed. Finally, the woman is seen holding various brown citiesocial shipping boxes, using a laptop in the kitchen, and presenting the products again in a collage-style montage with various promotional text overlays.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Mom has short curly brown hair, wears a white cardigan and a cat-patterned apron. Daughter has long black hair in twin braids, wears a white school-style uniform shirt and black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern apartment featuring a sleek kitchen with black fixtures and white countertops, a living room with a neutral-toned sofa and large windows with blinds, and a bedroom with a simple bed and bedside lamp.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a bright electronic chime and a fast-paced, upbeat synth-pop track. A female voice (Mom) starts nagging in a high-pitched, exaggerated tone with high vocal tension, counting numbers with sharp inflections. SFX of running water and apple washing are heard clearly over the mix. (2) A quick 'whoosh' transition leads to a more melodic musical bridge. Mom's voice softens into a pleasant, breathy exclamation of 'Mmm, delicious!' as a 'ding' sound effect highlights a product reveal. (3) A loud 'thud' of a door closing triggers a shift to a comedic, bouncy BGM rhythm. Mom's voice returns with high arousal and volume, shouting about chores with rapid speech and aggressive articulation. SFX of rustling clothes and heavy footsteps are synchronized with the visual transitions. (4) Another 'sparkle' SFX marks the presentation of a second product. The music becomes smooth and lounge-like, while Mom's voice adopts a professional, narrative tone with moderate speed. (5) A sharp 'gasp' and suspenseful cinematic riser sound effect occur when the lights go out. Mom lets out a loud 'WOW' shout followed by a cartoon-style 'horror' violin sting. (6) The low-frequency hum of a massage gun vibration becomes the primary sound event for a few seconds. The BGM shifts to a relaxing, airy texture. Finally, Mom's voice transitions into an informative, fast-paced commercial delivery, listing benefits and promotion details with clear articulation and positive valence until the final 'pop' sound effect ending.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous, relatable 'nagging mom' persona to showcase three different lifestyle products (fruit wash, tote bag, massage gun) available on the citiesocial platform. It transitions from comedic sketches of mother-daughter friction to a persuasive promotional narrative highlighting Mother's Day gifts and shopping discounts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product presentation with brand names, price discounts, and calls to action to join a LINE group and shop on the platform.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes social media editing trends, including high-density text overlays and cartoon sound effects, to maintain engagement throughout a multi-product promotion.
